Workflow.Name: Triggered Flow - Holiday Changes
Workflow.Description: When changes are made to the GRAIL Holidays table. Look for any tasks that are not completed/closed/cancelled and the holiday date modified is between the creation date and due date(-14). Recalculate the due dates for these events using Child Flow - Calculate Due Dates.

Description.description: When changes are made to the GRAIL Holidays table. Look for any tasks that are not completed/closed/cancelled and the holiday date modified is between the creation date and due date(-14). Recalculate the due dates for these events using Child Flow - Calculate Due Dates.
